// Use a Map rather than object to avoid unexpected __proto__ access. export default new Map([ ["quot", "\u0022"], ["amp", "&"], ["apos", "\u0027"], ["lt", "<"], ["gt", ">"], ["nbsp", "\u00A0"], ["iexcl", "\u00A1"], ["cent", "\u00A2"], ["pound", "\u00A3"], ["curren", "\u00A4"], ["yen", "\u00A5"], ["brvbar", "\u00A6"], ["sect", "\u00A7"], ["uml", "\u00A8"], ["copy", "\u00A9"], ["ordf", "\u00AA"], ["laquo", "\u00AB"], ["not", "\u00AC"], ["shy", "\u00AD"], ["reg", "\u00AE"], ["macr", "\u00AF"], ["deg", "\u00B0"], ["plusmn", "\u00B1"], ["sup2", "\u00B2"], ["sup3", "\u00B3"], ["acute", "\u00B4"], ["micro", "\u00B5"], ["para", "\u00B6"], ["middot", "\u00B7"], ["cedil", "\u00B8"], ["sup1", "\u00B9"], ["ordm", "\u00BA"], ["raquo", "\u00BB"], ["frac14", "\u00BC"], ["frac12", "\u00BD"], ["frac34", "\u00BE"], ["iquest", "\u00BF"], ["Agrave", "\u00C0"], ["Aacute", "\u00C1"], ["Acirc", "\u00C2"], ["Atilde", "\u00C3"], ["Auml", "\u00C4"], ["Aring", "\u00C5"], ["AElig", "\u00C6"], ["Ccedil", "\u00C7"], ["Egrave", "\u00C8"], ["Eacute", "\u00C9"], ["Ecirc", "\u00CA"], ["Euml", "\u00CB"], ["Igrave", "\u00CC"], ["Iacute", "\u00CD"], ["Icirc", "\u00CE"], ["Iuml", "\u00CF"], ["ETH",
